description: One paragraph: what concern family this profile covers, which mined failure sources it is derived from, and any 'verify against current docs/jurisdiction' caveats.

concerns.concern: One-line human statement of the concern area
triggers: OPTIONAL concern-level activation regex (unioned with profile-level)
concerns.prerequisite_note: Use for prerequisite-class concerns: state WHAT must be true BEFORE which work, and cite the source (regulation article, standard, named case). Set to null for plain scope concerns.
concerns.seed_question: The single question sequential-elicitation should ask a human when this concern is missing or partial.

_field_notes.severity: One of CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW (blind_spot_report contract).
_field_notes.activated_by: Stakeholder categories from the stakeholder_register contract: user | operator | supplier | regulator | sponsor | third_party. A matching category in --stakeholders activates the concern even without a text trigger.
_field_notes.activation: No triggers AND no activated_by (profile + concern level combined) = concern is unconditional. Otherwise the concern is skipped unless a trigger regex matches the artifact or an activated_by category is present in the register.
_field_notes.covered_min: Distinct indicator patterns that must match for status 'covered' (default 2; capped at the number of indicators). Exactly one match below the threshold = 'partial'; zero = 'missing'.
_field_notes.authoring: See references/profile_authoring_guide.md for the full recipe and the data-privacy worked example.
